notes: All LLM systems use the active TurboFlux endpoint and gpt-5.5.
Native reasoning is disabled; protocol differences are recorded per run.

Adaptive case-level concurrency starts at 4 and may rise to 4; FastContext uses one closed listwise model judgment and the API request ceiling is 4. Systems within one case remain sequential and rotated.
Transient failures are retried up to 5 time(s) per run invocation.
Selection starts at the first balanced case.
Three system runners launched concurrently in isolated output directories.
FastContext used an isolated workspace snapshot cache so .codegraph artifacts were invisible to Claude Code and OpenCode.
The outer 30-minute harness timed out after all journals and reports were written; unique run records are complete.
